concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: Formal transportability remains distinct from empirical generalizability audits; slice records here were mostly misassigned applied studies.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: Agent-based transmission models remain distinct from decision-analytic microsimulation and contact-network models; slice assignments were mostly misrouted.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: Operating-characteristic simulations are distinct from applied benchmarking and from mechanistic disease simulation.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: Mechanistic transmission models remain distinct from contact-network models and from estimator-performance simulations.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: simulation_methodological_evaluation vs applied_policy_intervention_simulation; mechanistic_compartmental_models; estimator_operating_characteristics; microsimulation_decision_analytic_models; healthcare_surveillance_benchmarking; quality_surveillance_benchmarking; benchmark_metric_and_threshold_development; simulation_model_calibration_inference; review_guideline_and_contextual_methods
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: This slice shows a catch-all bucket spanning several distinct concepts and should be split accordingly.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: Explicit comparisons of competing models or pipelines are distinct from single-estimator performance studies and assay validation.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: Bias-structure simulation remains distinct; slice assignments under this label were mostly ordinary intervention scenarios.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: All 150 slice titles/abstracts plus manifested concept tables.
concept_decisions.rationale: Synthetic-data benchmark designs remain distinct from empirical robustness studies and generic method comparison.
